items.title: Presenter Pack
items.description: All-in-one judge presentation resource: 2-min walkthrough script, Methods & Rigor presenter cues, full speech scripts, Q&A prep, and ISEF display guidance.

items.title: Talking Story
items.description: 20-minute talking story script by Yana Evteeva: analogy-driven educational lecture covering the gut–brain axis, pilot data, and the D→X→M→Y simulator pipeline.

items.title: Alternative Talking Script
items.description: Alternative judge presentation script by Yana Evteeva: concise mechanistic walkthrough with Q&A cheat sheet and 20-second fallback answer.

items.title: Study Guide & Reference
items.description: Student edition study guide: key terms, biology primer, pipeline walkthrough, pilot data explained, glossary, and judge Q&A preparation.

items.title: Image Credits
items.description: ISEF-compliant image credits for all embedded figures: gut–brain axis concept illustrations, trifold visuals, and application screenshots.

items.title: User Guide
items.description: Judge-facing app walkthrough with screenshots: all screens, Presenter Mode, badges, and UI conventions.

items.title: Presentation Addendum
items.description: Companion to the approved abstract; limitations, lessons learned, and dataset-reality roadmap. Does not modify the approved abstract.

items.title: External Datasets Overview
items.description: Reference datasets, bundling details, data build notes, and licensing for all external sources used in CogniBiome.

items.title: References & Licenses
items.description: Licenses and attribution notes for all offline reference snapshots used in CogniBiome.

items.title: Initial — Full Design & Visuals
items.description: Initial trifold board design with embedded printable visuals. Original version before AI-assisted revisions.

items.title: Initial — Top Banner
items.description: Initial trifold top banner: project title, student info, what this is/is not, and key idea.

items.title: Initial — Left Panel
items.description: Initial trifold left panel: abstract, research question, hypothesis, and background research.

items.title: Initial — Center Panel
items.description: Initial trifold center panel: materials, procedure, and results (pilot correlation table, n=66).

items.title: Initial — Right Panel
items.description: Initial trifold right panel: analysis, conclusion, limitations, future directions, and suggested visuals.

items.title: Yana — Abstract
items.description: Yana's trifold abstract: two-part framework, pilot correlation results, deterministic simulator, and primary contribution.

items.title: Yana — Research Question & Hypothesis
items.description: Yana's trifold research question and hypothesis with biological rationale.

items.title: Yana — Biological Rationale
items.description: Yana's trifold biological rationale: gut–brain axis, SCFAs, tryptophan signaling, and methodological gap.

items.title: Yana — Modeling Framework & Procedure
items.description: Yana's trifold modeling framework: D→X→M→Y pipeline, measured vs modeled labeling, and reproducibility.

items.title: Yana — Findings, Conclusion & Limitations
items.description: Yana's trifold key findings (r values), conclusion with interpretation boundaries, and limitations.

items.title: Yana — Future Directions
items.description: Yana's trifold future directions: paired datasets, trained artifacts, confounder modeling, and generalization.

items.title: Final — Abstract
items.description: Final trifold abstract: updated framing — primary contribution is the reproducible workflow; robust inference requires larger paired datasets.

items.title: Final — Research Question & Hypothesis
items.description: Final trifold research question (workflow-focused) and updated hypothesis with proxy-layer clarification.

items.title: Final — Biological Rationale
items.description: Final trifold biological rationale: gut–brain axis, SCFAs, tryptophan, and methodological gap (updated ending).

items.title: Final — Modeling Framework & Procedure
items.description: Final trifold modeling framework: D→X→M→Y with explicit measured vs modeled labeling and updated procedure notes.

items.title: Final — Findings, Conclusion & Limitations
items.description: Final trifold key findings, updated conclusion (workflow contribution framing), and updated limitations.

items.title: Final — Future Directions
items.description: Final trifold future directions: trained artifacts, confounder modeling, and generalization to other multi-layer problems.
